title: The Order Block Trap That Breaks Funded Traders (2026)
description: Stop falling for end-of-card order block traps. The R2F Trading system breaks down the exact setup smart money uses to hunt your stops — and how to flip it in your favor. Follow r2ftrading.com for daily ICT setups.
script: That order block looked perfect. Then it wiped 8% of my account in 4 minutes. It wasn't a real order block. It was a trap. And smart money built it just for you. Tip one. End-card order blocks sit right at a session high or low. That's the first red flag. Tip two. If price taps that block and wicks through? Smart money is sweeping liquidity — not reversing. Tip three. Wait for the displacement candle AFTER the sweep. That's your real entry — not before. The R2F Trading system calls this the End Card Test. Price has to prove itself before we touch it. Follow R2F Trading. New ICT setups every single day. Link in bio at r2ftrading.com.
